title: Create Items via Email Feature Limited to Licensed Users

posts.author: gweir (George Weir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to email a task request directly to a board is an exciting feature for us. However, I have just learned that this ability is limited to licensed users or 3 guests only. I would suggest that requestors are not users of the system and there should not be a limitation.

We are a small team and only 2-3 are currently considered users of the system, with the possibility of 2 more being added.

The rest of our team only need to see read-only views for status checks and making requests (currently done via email). I cannot expand my licensing for more seats simply to allow them to email a request into the board. As such, this feature is not a solution for us.

What are you trying to achieve

Please consider removing the limited number of guest able to use this feature and allow this for unlimited guests (or a reasonable limit of 25? users).
